performance-overview-description: This section provides an immediate view of high-level quantity indicators. By summarizing total user interactions and identifying primary query types, we establish a baseline for measuring engagement health. Positive trends indicate successful top-funnel marketing activities.
interaction-count-description: Number of interactions recorded during the period
intent-distribution-description: Segmentation of user actions based on specific labels. A high volume of 'price inquiries' indicates price sensitivity, while 'detail inquiries' suggests a higher level of consideration.
target-market-and-product-segmentation-d: Deep dive into specific brands and regions driving the highest activity. This data helps with inventory planning and regional marketing allocation
region-activity-ranking-description: Active countries sorted by event volume.
engagement-timeline-description: Total daily user events. We analyze this trend to associate marketing campaigns or weekend patterns with user activity peaks. The persistence here is key to retention.
